name: Hamantashen # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs, gradually adding sugar.
2. Sift flour with baking powder and salt into egg mixture alternately with oil. Add orange rind last.
3. Form dough into a ball and wrap in floured waxed paper. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
4. Break off a piece large enough to roll into a ball about the size of a golf ball.
5. Roll and pat it down into a circle about 2-3 inches in diameter on top of a floured piece of waxed paper (flour your hands if needed).
6. Fill with favorite filling.
7. Roll up sides and pinch corners together to form a triangle shape.
8. Place on greased cookie sheet and bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or convection bake at 325°F for 15-20 minutes, until lightly browned. Cool on racks.
Suggested fillings: Chocolate chips, M&M's, chocolate kisses, cherry pie filling, apricot jam and marzipan.
